user_id.description: Reference to the userʼs ID who create this refund. This is automatically populated by BigCommerce.

created.description: Timestamp of when this refund was created.

total_tax.description: Total tax amount refunded back to the shopper. Note: `order_level_amount` does not affect tax liability. This can be a negative amount indicating we have collected tax by refunding less to the customer.

uses_merchant_override_values.description: Whether refund amount and tax are provided explicitly by merchant override.

payments.description: An array of refund payments made to payment providers.
